data.content: Implementation review approved. Branch `codex/56d4-install-cli-warning` at commit `659c1ad25cff` matches the knot requirement: installer warning logic now accepts `bd`, `kno`, or `knots`, and the added test coverage verifies the warning is emitted only when all are absent. Validation evidence is green (`bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, `bun run build`) and the worktree is clean.
